children.text: Dr. Alan Ali agrees with Dr. Lawrence Smith's answer
How can I help a  pre teen lose weight without giving her a self esteem problem?
A good place to start is to consult with her doctor. The doctor can identify healthy goals for weight-loss, provide support, and monitor progress. It ...read more
Using mindfulness, you're observing what's presently happening in yourself, rather than automatically going back to old patterns between you and your ...read more
Dr. Robert Kwok: Get personalized health information from HealthTap! Your private profile is only 25% complete. Tell doctors more to get even better answers.
Made with a smile in sunny California
